name: POPLITEAL ARTERY ENTRAPMENT SYNDROME
definition: vascular compression syndrome of popliteal artery (PopA)

demographics.Prevalence: 0.165% of young males entering military service

dominant_finding: ankle-arm index reduced during active muscle contraction
distribution: posterior tibial pulse obliterated during active plantar flexion against resistance /
discriminating_features: posterior tibial pulse obliterated during active plantar flexion against resistance /
ankle-arm index reduced during active muscle contraction
Doppler waveforms of posterior tibial artery diminished during muscle contractions
medial deviation of artery (29%), popliteal stenosis (11%), poststenotic dilatation (8%)
arteriography with typical medial deviation of popliteal artery before + after gastrocnemius

general: posterior tibial pulse obliterated during active plantar flexion against resistance /
ankle-arm index reduced during active muscle contraction
Doppler waveforms of posterior tibial artery diminished during muscle contractions
medial deviation of artery (29%), popliteal stenosis (11%), poststenotic dilatation (8%)
arteriography with typical medial deviation of popliteal artery before + after gastrocnemius
